sys_metadata_link.payload: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="x_snc_vehicle_ma_0_vehicle"> <x_snc_vehicle_ma_0_vehicle action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"> <city>Weimar</city> <country>Germany</country> <description>sodales sed tincidunt eu felis fusce posuere felis sed lacus morbi sem mauris laoreet ut rhoncus</description> <end_date>2019-11-30</end_date> <make>BMW</make> <model>X5</model> <pin>6659</pin> <start_date>2014-11-28</start_date> <sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by> <sys_created_on>2026-02-17 05:00:41</sys_created_on> <sys_id>a3f58be6fd4b32107f44b9211467fe3f</sys_id> <sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count> <sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by> <sys_updated_on>2026-02-17 05:00:41</sys_updated_on> <vin>1B3CC1FB4AN941119</vin> <year>2014</year> </x_snc_vehicle_ma_0_vehicle> </record_update>
